summary: Iteration 64 - Competition Verification & Stoked Dashboard Testing Complete. Fixed critical bug in AdminCompetitionVerification.js where API parameters were sent in request body instead of query params. All features working correctly.

pending_verifications_endpoint.details: Returns pending competition results with surfer info, event details, placing, heat wins

verify_competition_result_endpoint.details: Accepts admin_id and approved params, awards XP based on placing/heat_wins/tier, updates verification_status

admin_dashboard_competition_tab.details: AdminDashboard has Competition tab that loads AdminCompetitionVerification component

admin_competition_verification_ui.details: Shows pending results with surfer avatar, event name, date, place, tier, heat wins, verify/reject buttons

verify_button_functionality.details: Clicking verify button sends API request, shows success toast 'Result verified! XP awarded', removes from list

stoked_dashboard.details: Shows XP progress bar with level, Sessions Joined, Badges Earned, Event Wins, Sponsor Support, Quick Actions

sidebar_role_navigation.details: Sidebar shows The Peak (amber) and Stoked (yellow) tabs for Pro role

mobile_bottomnav_role_navigation.details: Mobile bottom nav shows The Peak tab for Comp Surfer/Pro roles as expected

bug_fixed.issue: handleVerify was sending admin_id and approved in request body, but backend expects query parameters
bug_fixed.fix: Changed axios.post to send params via `params: { approved, admin_id }` instead of request body
bug_fixed.error_before_fix: 422 Unprocessable Entity, React runtime error 'Objects are not valid as a React child'

critical_code_review_comments: AdminCompetitionVerification.js handleVerify fixed - now sends params correctly
Backend verify endpoint working with proper XP calculation logic
Stoked Dashboard correctly fetches and displays gamification, career stats, stoke income data
Role-based navigation working - Comp Surfer/Pro see The Peak, all surfers see Stoked in sidebar
context_for_next_testing_agent: Competition verification UI fixed and working. Verified 1 of 3 TEST_ results during testing, 2 pending remain. XP awarded correctly (total_xp: 400 for Kelly Slater). AdminCompetitionVerification.js now correctly sends params as query params.
screenshots_taken: Competition tab showing pending results with verify/reject buttons
After verification - toast showing 'Result verified! XP awarded'
Stoked Dashboard with XP progress, stats grid, quick actions
Mobile feed with bottom nav showing The Peak tab
